description: A production accountant allocates the total oil, gas, and water production measured at a central facility back to the individual wells that feed into it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the total commingled production volumes from the central facility for the previous day.

expected_outcome.value: The total sales volumes are retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Gather the latest well test data for all wells connected to the facility.

expected_outcome.value: Individual well test results (oil/gas/water rates) are compiled.

nodes.task_description: Run the production allocation algorithm to distribute the total facility volumes back to each well based on their test rates.

expected_outcome.value: The system calculates and assigns the final allocated production volumes for each well for the day.
